info.name: Sawyer Branding (default)
info.summary: Injects sawyer-cloud default-flavor branding JS + CSS into every Nextcloud page.
info.description:
Small, framework-free Nextcloud app used as the JS/CSS injection vehicle for sawyer-cloud deployments on the default flavor. Operators never edit the PHP side (CLAUDE.md §3.4 marks lib/ as OVERRIDE territory); JS/CSS edits land in js/ and css/ and ship with the base image.
This app is enabled by bootstrap.sh on every deploy. Disabling it must go through `occ app:disable branding_default` — do not unregister scripts via info.xml in an upgrade.
info.author: sawyer-cloud engineering
